title: Policy
description: An Identity and Access Management (IAM) policy which specifies access controls for Google Cloud resources. A Policy is a collection of bindings that associate members with roles.

version.description: Specifies the format of the policy. Valid values are 0, 1, and 3. Version 3 supports conditional role bindings.

bindings.description: Associates a list of members to a role, optionally with a condition.

etag.description: etag is used for optimistic concurrency control to help prevent simultaneous updates of a policy from overwriting each other.
